notes: This package uses the GitHub releases build of the Qt Creator wininterrupt utility.
These builds are not officially supported. For official packages, see https://download.qt.io/official_releases/qtcreator
Only x64 builds are available from GitHub releases (no arm64).
Do not install alongside 'extras/qt-creator-wininterrupt' — both target the same parent app directory.
pre_uninstall: Get-Item "$dir in\win*interrupt.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | foreach { Remove-Item "$(appdir qt-creator-git $global)\current in\$($_.Name)" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
post_install: (Get-Item $dir in\win*interrupt.exe).Name | foreach { New-Item "$(appdir qt-creator-git $global)\current in\$_" -ItemType HardLink -Target "$dir in\$_" -Force | Out-Null }
